metadata.description: Ramazan's personal collection of Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: skillz
plugins.description: A growing bundle of personal Claude Code skills. Currently: file-transfer (push/pull files to the macminim Mac mini over passwordless SSH), claude-ai-archive (import/sync a claude.ai data export into a local on-disk mirror), sprite (Sprite VM environment agent), sprite-api-gateway (authenticated external API access from a Sprite), test-on-sprite (test a repo in a disposable Sprite VM via herdr panes), and herdr (modified fork of herdr's AGPL-3.0 agent skill with corrected pane self-identification).
